request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a contract's heat tier and its top recent matching records, write a one-sentence (≤220 char) explanation of what is driving heat at this level this week. Also list 1-3 short primary drivers (≤120 chars each). Return JSON matching the schema.
request.user:
Tier: critical
Heat: 199.98
Delta_7d: -97.37
Top records:
- 2024-05-16 Compliance Outreach on Regulation S-P
- 2024-04-17 Proposed Rule Change to Amend the MSRB's Real-Time Transaction Reporting System 
- 2024-04-09 Aon Investments USA Inc., fka Aon Hewitt Investment Consulting, Inc.
- 2024-04-01 Semiannual Report to Congress: April 1, 2024, through September 30, 2024
- 2024-03-27 Shortening the Securities Transaction Settlement Cycle

primary_drivers: Proposals to shorten the securities settlement cycle
MSRB proposed changes to real-time transaction reporting
Regulation S-P compliance outreach and a firm-level enforcement notice
response.explainer: Critical heat is driven by concentrated regulatory action this week — high‑impact proposals to shorten the settlement cycle and amend MSRB real-time reporting, plus Regulation S‑P outreach and a firm enforcement matter.
